sourceNote: Underlying on-chain and market metrics are derived from Coin Metrics. Raw Coin Metrics data are not redistributed; this dashboard uses normalized and entropy-derived datasets released for the DLT 2025 study.

set1.label: Set1
set1.description: Compact activity and market view from the DLT 2025 paper.

set2.label: Set2
set2.description: Dynamic network behaviour: participation, transfer size, turnover, active supply, and wealth distribution.

set3.label: Set3
set3.description: Experimental extension: Set2 plus fee pressure. USDC is not available for this set in the released data.

custom.label: Custom set
custom.description: Create your own analytical set by selecting any available normalized attribute. Use the builder below to start empty, copy one of the paper presets, or select all available attributes.
